meaning: adj.好吃的,可口的n.好吃的东西,吸引人的东西
examples: Although it is tasty, crab is very filling.
You don't have to spend a fortune to give your family tasty, healthy meals.
'We have to buy flour, sugar and coffee... but everything homemade is more tasty!'
They claim that insect-based food is not only tasty but also rich in protein.
